audit_result: CountingFiberSeparationFromNonProp and FiberMassBalanceFromNonProp are currently proved separately from NonPropFinalCarrierInvariant.
weakest_missing_lemma: For every NonPropFinalCarrierInvariant I, CountingFiberSeparationFromNonProp I -> FiberMassBalanceFromNonProp I.
equivalent_repair_path: Strengthen CountingFiberSeparationWitness so that it carries exactly the entropy-mass data needed to construct FiberMassBalanceWitness.
